name: local-file-browser-verification
description: Open and verify a local HTML/web project in a browser, including visual layout, responsive behavior, interaction, console errors, local asset loading, and post-edit smoke testing. Use for browser QA of local files or localhost; do not use for generic coding or live-site automation unrelated to verification.
triggers: click the button and see what happens
debug why the ui does not work
take a screenshot of the local page
open this html and test it
start an http server for this file
use browser tools to test it

resources.description: Concise report template for local browser/file verification results.
Browser JS snippets for diagnosing covered buttons, intercepted clicks, and touch overlays.
When to set narrow viewport before first navigation for mobile Safari/local HTML verification.
